title: Welcome to the New DPS Website
author: DPS Web Team
content:
We're excited to launch the rebuilt DPS website. Built on a modern, fast foundation, the new site loads quicker, looks cleaner on phones and laptops alike, and makes school news, events, and resources easier to find.

Over the coming weeks we'll be adding more sections: a refreshed admissions guide, a photo gallery from recent events, and a calendar you can sync to your own devices.

Thank you for visiting, and stay tuned for weekly updates right here on the blog.
